about.title: About me

about.paragraph2: I enjoy transforming ideas into beautiful and functional web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Vue.js, and modern web technologies. I continuously learn new skills and love creating clean, professional user interfaces.

projects.chronosguardSubtitle: Blockchain-powered platform for secure digital asset registration, verification, and IP protection using immutable ownership records.

overview.title: Project Overview
overview.p1: ChronosGuard is a blockchain-powered web application built to solve a fundamental problem in the digital age: proving ownership of creative work.
overview.p2: Creators — from artists and musicians to developers and writers — often struggle to protect their digital assets. Traditional copyright systems are slow, opaque, and inaccessible to independent creators. ChronosGuard changes that by leveraging blockchain immutability and IPFS decentralised storage.
overview.p3: By anchoring ownership records to the blockchain at the moment of creation, ChronosGuard provides tamper-proof, timestamped proof that no central authority can alter or revoke.
overview.p4: This project was built to make intellectual property protection as simple as uploading a file.

coreIdea.title: Core Concept
coreIdea.p1: The platform's foundation is the idea that ownership should be self-sovereign — controlled by the creator, not a corporation or government registry.
coreIdea.p2: ChronosGuard uses IPFS to store digital assets in a distributed network, and records the corresponding content hash and ownership metadata on-chain. This dual-layer approach ensures both the asset and its provenance are permanently verifiable by anyone, at any time, with no single point of failure.

userFriendly.title: Built for Creators, Not Lawyers
userFriendly.p1: ChronosGuard strips away the complexity that typically surrounds IP protection. The interface is clean and intuitive — creators register their work in seconds without needing any blockchain knowledge.
userFriendly.p2: The verification flow is equally simple: anyone can check the authenticity of a digital asset by querying its on-chain record, returning a certificate of ownership with a timestamp and creator wallet address.

status.title: Platform Status
status.p1: ChronosGuard is live and deployed on Netlify, with smart contracts running on a test network.
status.p2: Current development focus is on expanding support for additional file formats, adding bulk registration, and preparing for mainnet deployment with gas optimisation.

purpose.title: Project Purpose
purpose.p1: ChronosGuard exists to democratise intellectual property protection — giving every creator, regardless of resources, an immutable, globally verifiable record of their work the moment it's made.
